title: A Coffee, Please
description: Ordering a coffee at a cafe. Simple A1 exchange with a barista — greeting, ordering, size, and paying.

t1.text: Hi there! What can I get for you today?

templates.text: Hi. Can I have a coffee, please?
templates.hint_zh: 你好，我可以點一杯咖啡嗎？

t3.text: Sure! What size would you like? Small, medium, or large?

t5.text: Got it. Would you like anything else?

t7.text: That'll be three fifty. Here's your coffee. Enjoy!

templates.hint_zh: 謝謝，祝你有美好的一天！
